description_long: This is a square, pastel pink box of lotion labeled 'LOVE CHERRY BLOSSOM' with prominent branding and product information on all sides. The front face features the product name, SPF rating, and highlights such as hyaluronic acid and intense hydration, along with the 'BEAUTIFOL' brand logo. The back and side panels provide detailed ingredient lists and usage instructions in both French and English, printed in fine text. Subtle cherry blossom graphics and a soft, floral motif are visible on the packaging, enhancing its aesthetic appeal. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard, likely containing a jar or tub of lotion inside. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for display in personal care or retail environments.
description: A pastel pink, square box of 'LOVE CHERRY BLOSSOM' lotion with floral graphics and detailed product information on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the product name, SPF rating, and key features, with floral graphics and the 'BEAUTIFOL' logo.
description_view_1: This side displays the full ingredient list and additional product details in small text.
description_view_2: The opposite face highlights the product name and logo, with a window or image of the lotion jar inside.
description_view_3: The back view provides detailed usage instructions and product description in paragraph form.
